title: Baby Bath Toys, Octopus Sensory Light Up Bath Toys, Automatic Induction Spray Water Toys, Bath Time Shower Gifts for Baby Girls Boys（Blue）
features: This octopus bath toy can emit colorful soft lights and spray water upwards, which is very interesting and attract the attention of babies so that they can enjoy a happy bathing time.

【Auto-Sensing】After you put the octopus in the water, it automatically starts spraying water and flashing colorful lights. When it leaves the water, all effects will stop immediately. No manual operation is required, and operation is simple. Requires 1.5V 3AAA batteries (not included).

【Safe Materials】Product dimensions:12cm*5cm/4.8*1.96in. Super cute water spray toy is made of high quality ABS material which is durable. 360° No edges and corners design, no need to worry about your baby will be hurt. The right size is good for small hands.
【A wonderful gift】It can be used in bathtubs, swimming pools, showers or outdoors and on the beach. For toddlers and kids, it is the best choice for birthday gifts, Easter gifts, holiday gifts.

【Early learning toy】Vivid colors and funny octopus shapes that attract baby's attention can help stimulate hours of imaginative play for children to develop their hand-eye coordination and motor skills.

【Quality guarantee】Customers is our top priority. If you have any questions or quality problems with this baby bath toy, please send an email directly to the seller and we will offer you a solution within 24 hours.
description: Product Description Jovicos Octopus Baby Toys, Light Up Bath Toys for Toddlers Auto-sensing No manual operation bath toys, just put the bath toy in the water and it will start to spray a beautiful fountain. Smooth Edges Our bathly toys is made of high quality ABS material and with smooth edge. Perfect size for tiny hands. Waterproof Design Our octopus toys have a double waterproof rubber, which is more sealed and waterproof than other bath toys on the market. Let you and your child have a fun bath time. Maintenance and cleaning tips: 1.Please tighten the screwsat the bottom of the toy to prevent water seepage and soaking into the battery when placedin water, causing pollution.) 2.In order to ensure the product quality, dry the toy after use.remove the back cover of the battery and dry it in a ventilated place. Long-term soaking in humid ervironment is easy to oxidize andrust, resuting in poor contact (no electicity) When not in use for a long time, please remove the battery to avoid rusting. 3. When not in use, please wipe the ball's water sensors dry(little black round dots) and leave it upside down and all water drains. If it still doesn't turn off, then there have something wrong with the sensors, please let us know about a new replacement. 4.If the toy does not spray water, it may be clogged. Use a soft brush (such as a clean toothbrush) .OR indicates trapped air. The toy must be fully submerged in water to release the air. Afterward, it wllspray normally again. Troubleshooting Guide Q1: Why is there little or no water coming out? A1:This indicates that there is air inside. Solution1: You need to immerse it in water to release the air. Then it will spray water normally again. A2: A blockage exists in the water system. Inspect the nozzle (top): Clear all dirt or debris. Inspect the suction port (bottom): Remove any obstructions. Solution2: Clean both areas with a soft brush or toothpick. Rinse thoroughly and retest. Q2: Lights work, but water spray is weak. Why? A: Battery power is insufficient for the pump (despite supporting lights). Solution: Replace with new batteries of the specified type. Q3: Toy doesn’t work at all. What’s wrong? A: Causes include: Dead/incorrectly installed batteries (+/- reversed), Water damage causing corrosion, or Loose electrical contacts. Solution: Verify correct battery orientation.Install new batteries. Dry the toy thoroughly inside and out. Let it air-dry for several days before installing new batteries. Tighten all screws securely. Q4: Could water damage the toy? A: Yes. Seals are compromised, or Internal components are exposed to moisture. Solution: Keep the toy dry and make sure to tighten the screws after installing the batteries. Q5: Changed batteries, still not working? A: Internal failure exists, caused by: Circuit damage, or Unresolved water ingress. Solution: Repair product or exchange Q6: Where should I avoid using this toy? A: To ensure functionality and longevity: Never expose to extreme temperatures (heat/cold).Prevent hard impacts on surfaces.Use only specified batteries (1.5V × 3 AAA). Specifications： Product dimensions:12cm*5cm/4.8*1.96in. Packaging dimensions: 7.7*14cm/3.0in*5.7in Requires 1.5V 3AAA batteries (not included). Material: ABS plastic
